title: Is there a plan to support compilation into different libraries and configurations to select which library to use?

features.name: config block declaration with design
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog config block that specifies which library to elaborate the top-level design from using the 'design libname.modname' syntax

features.name: config instance override with use clause
features.description: Code should include a config block with an instance-specific override that specifies which library and config to use for a particular module instance using 'instance path use lib.config:config' syntax

features.name: config default liblist specification
features.description: Code should include a config block that specifies the default library search order using 'default liblist libname' syntax

features.name: library-prefixed module reference
features.description: Code should include a module reference that uses library prefix syntax 'libname.modname' to reference modules compiled into specific libraries
features.snippet:
design lib_rtl_a.m_adder;
instance adder_sim_tb.u_m_adder use lib_config.a_adder_config:config;
